the kolu atlas

The Atlas.

kolu's in-repo knowledge base — a tree generated from each note's parents frontmatter; nothing falls through unfiled. 13 notes.

seedling budding evergreen
  • Electricity — identified, and their progress A tracker for kolu's electricities — infrastructure pulled out from beneath the app into its own thing — and where each stands. review
    • Code browser preview → @kolu/solid-fileview Invent the grid, slim the house — a Source ⇄ Rendered file-view toggle built on reusable leaf packages. Markdown is the first lit toggle; HTML/SVG next. design
      • Cite → open in the Code browser Make <Cite> refs open the cited file in kolu's Code-tab tree (line-highlighted) when a note is previewed inside kolu — wiring three pieces that already exist. plan proposed
      • Code-tab filter strands empty directories Why filtering the Code-tab tree left hollow, result-less folders — Pierre's remove promotes an emptied dir to EXPLICIT — and the directoryRemovalOps fix, with the /hickey + /lowy verdict. plan
    • Is Mobile Electricity? A Hickey/Lowy review of kolu's mobile support — is mobile an encapsulated change behind a receptacle, or smeared across every consumer measuring the voltage? review
  • Ghostex vs. kolu remote-terminals What Ghostex's PTY-persistence choice does and doesn't teach kolu's in-progress remote-terminals plan — one concrete borrow (honest pane⟂session state), one corroboration, one reframe; the "lean on a mux" swing doesn't survive review. research
  • nix build ≠ typecheck A talk-mode diagnosis of research accepted
  • Phantom running_background — Claude shows "running" forever Why the spinner survives a Claude restart — an orphaned background-launch marker has no completion, so the waiting→running_background promotion never decays. Diagnosis + fix. plan
  • Preferences storm Debouncing the rightPanel resize feedback loop (#1041) — Corvu's idempotent re-emits + a no-equals prefs cell cause ~200 writes/min; the fix splits apply-local-now from a coalesced, patch-space server flush. research accepted
  • The kolu Atlas kolu's second brain — an in-repo, MDX-authored knowledge base in a self-contained Astro project, dogfooded in the Code tab. design proposed
    • Cite → open in the Code browser Make <Cite> refs open the cited file in kolu's Code-tab tree (line-highlighted) when a note is previewed inside kolu — wiring three pieces that already exist. plan proposed
  • Video evidence for PRs Screencast capture + a shared Pages player — the substrate the evidence skill and per-release demos build on. Capture now rides the existing Cucumber harness. design
  • Whole-codebase correctness review A static audit of path authority, terminal lifecycle, channel cancellation, session-restore fidelity, parser failures, and kill confirmation. Not a style review. review
  • Workflow viewer Integrating Claude Code dynamic-workflow JSONL into kolu — surfacing fan-out runs on the tile chrome and an Inspector run-list with live timelines. plan
